description: Happy path: full inputs with keyword cluster returns keyword-first title, keyword-rich description, alt text, and character counts within limits

input.topic: dark moody bedroom makeover with thrifted nightstands

expect.pin_title: string max 100 chars, opens with primary keyword phrase not brand name
expect.pin_description: string max 500 chars, front-loads keywords in first sentence, ends with CTA
expect.alt_text: string max 500 chars, describes the image specifically with 1 to 2 keywords woven in
expect.seo_keywords_used: array containing keywords from the cluster
expect.character_counts: object with pin_title, pin_description, alt_text as integers within limits

prohibit: title opening with 'I' or the brand name instead of the keyword
em dashes anywhere in the output
fabricated search volume or engagement benchmarks

description: Minimal input: topic only with no keyword cluster, video_url, board_name, or persona

expect.pin_title: keyword-first title derived from topic, max 100 chars
expect.pin_description: keyword-rich description with CTA, max 500 chars
expect.seo_keywords_used: array of keywords derived from the topic alone
expect.character_counts: all three fields present with integer values
expect.notes: may note that no keyword cluster was provided

prohibit: empty seo_keywords_used when topic is provided
alt_text that keyword-stuffs rather than describing an image
em dashes anywhere in the output

description: Edge case: very long topic that could cause title to exceed 100 chars; atom trims and documents in notes

input.topic: how to transform a builder-basic bathroom into a dark moody vintage spa retreat with thrifted mirrors and antique brass hardware on a budget

expect.pin_title: max 100 chars; primary keyword preserved at the front despite trimming
expect.pin_description: max 500 chars; full topic detail moved into description body
expect.notes: non-null string explaining any trimming or shortening applied

prohibit: primary keyword phrase removed or buried due to trimming
silent truncation without a note in the notes field
em dashes anywhere in the output
